final:
module RefModule(
    input [2-1:1-1] A,
    input [1:0] B,
    output reg [1:0] out
);always @(*) begin
        if (A > B) begin
            out = 2'b01;
        end else if (A < B) begin
            out = 2'b10;
        end else begin
            out = 2'b11;
        end
    end

endmodule
